goal:
GOAL:
- Identify what configuration/data was loaded into the agent system.

FIRST_STEPS:
- list_files to explore the sandbox root structure
- read_file on any configuration or evidence-related files found

RISKS:
- No clear indication of what "evidence" refers to in this context
- May need to check multiple directories for relevant files

DONE_WHEN:
- Found and read the relevant configuration/evidence files
